response.justification: With 17 years of broad engineering experience and recent AI-agent tooling work, the candidate clears the tenure bar, but the role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized, deep AI expertise and a track record of advising strategic customers and shaping AI platform strategy at scale — none of which is in evidence here. The AI work listed is recent (April 2025) and operational in nature, and the overall career trajectory is that of a senior/staff individual contributor, not a Principal-level strategist.
strengths: 17+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems meets the minimum tenure requirement
Founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and end-to-end product ownership
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, showing recent exposure to agentic workflows
concerns: No formal AI/ML education and no demonstrated depth in AI research, model development, or large-scale AI platform architecture
Career seniority is at the Staff/Senior developer level, not the director-level IC profile the role requires for strategic customer advisory and organizational influence
No evidence of thought leadership, published work, conference keynotes, or enterprise advisory engagements that would signal recognized external AI expertise
